title: Unexpected point get plan for range columns partition
description:
## Bug Report

Please answer these questions before submitting your issue. Thanks!

### 1. Minimal reproduce step (Required)

```
CREATE TABLE `te7463d33` (
  `col_3` json DEFAULT NULL,
  `col_4` varchar(223) DEFAULT 'QKd^)QlWh#cT&3',
  UNIQUE KEY `idx_3` (`col_4`)
) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_bin
PARTITION BY RANGE COLUMNS(`col_4`)
(PARTITION `p0` VALUES LESS THAN ('+*8Ab='),
 PARTITION `p1` VALUES LESS THAN ('959#Km%JOy2EFI'),
 PARTITION `p2` VALUES LESS THAN ('FbL~@RpX01&CYY-%%+'),
 PARTITION `p3` VALUES LESS THAN ('GFB'),
 PARTITION `p4` VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));

explain select * from te7463d33 where te7463d33.col_4 in ( 'u^D92@_4' ,null );
```

### 2. What did you expect to see? (Required)

no error

### 3. What did you see instead (Required)

Before https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/61141, it will return wrong result

After https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/61141, report unexpected error like
```
mysql> explain select * from te7463d33 where te7463d33.col_4 in ( 'u^D92@_4' ,null );
ERROR 1105 (HY000): too many partitions matching for PointGetPlan
```

### 4. What is your TiDB version? (Required)

<!-- Paste the output of SELECT tidb_version() -->

```
mysql> SELECT tidb_version();
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| tidb_version()                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
| Release Version: v9.0.0-alpha-875-g23de08cfb5
Edition: Community
Git Commit Hash: 23de08cfb549df008edd69f3a9a7313ab18ecff3
Git Branch: master
UTC Build Time: 2025-06-05 03:52:07
GoVersion: go1.24.0
Race Enabled: false
Check Table Before Drop: false
Store: unistore
Kernel Type: Classic |
+-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------+
1 row in set (0.00 sec)
```
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_partition ( id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL, value DECIMAL(10,2) DEFAULT NULL, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ) PARTITION BY RANGE (name) (PARTITION p0 VALUES LESS THAN ('A'), PARTITION p1 VALUES LESS THAN ('M'), PARTITION p2 VALUES LESS THAN ('Z'), PARTITION p3 VALUES LESS THAN (MAXVALUE));
SELECT * FROM test_partition WHERE name IN ('Alice', NULL);
EXPLAIN SELECT * FROM test_partition WHERE name IN ('Charlie', NULL);
key_bug_features: PointGetPlan error with range columns partition
